text.title: Accessibility Evaluation Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: scan
step.action: Run axe-core + Pa11y + Lighthouse; emit normalised JSON.

step.name: triage
step.action: Dedup, map to WCAG SC, assign priority (critical/high/medium/low).

step.name: keyboard-trace
step.action: Run Playwright keyboard-only trace; verify Tab order, focus visibility, traps, skip-links, shortcut conflicts.

step.name: screen-reader-verify
step.action: Human runs each pairing; records audio + transcript; updates findings with AT evidence.
step.decision-gate: Findings without AT recording cannot reach 'verified' status.

step.name: emit-report
step.action: Render POUR-grouped report from templates/audit-report.md with W3C-technique citations.
